category_sources: source_facts.description says charmcraft builds charms and publishes them on Charmhub; official Charmcraft docs describe initializing, packaging, and publishing Juju charms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is charmcraft; the official documentation title and official repository use Charmcraft.
docs_sources: The official canonical/charmcraft repository links to documentation.ubuntu.com/charmcraft as the documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; the official Canonical Charmcraft documentation and repository identify canonical/charmcraft as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies building and publishing charms on Charmhub; source_facts.executables lists charmcraft.
